title: VinFast Callbot — Kế Hoạch Thi Công Chi Tiết (Bản Hợp Nhất)
summary: Four-phase, two-week construction plan for a Vietnamese-language voice callbot covering architecture, dialogue core, exception handling, voice I/O, evaluation, and demo deliverables.

phases.name: Nền tảng & Kiến trúc
phases.gate: Gate 0: mic→transcript OK · Ollama Vietnamese OK · asr_latency_ms measured · 5-category schema locked · Architecture Doc drafted · ≥1 scenario/category

phases.name: Lõi Hội Thoại (text mode)
phases.gate: Gate 1: all 5 categories complete happy-path text mode · final JSON matches schema · normalization tests pass · ≥1 golden case/category in harness

phases.name: Exception Handling & Voice I/O
phases.gate: Gate 2: 8 exception scenarios demo-able · live mic→ASR→engine→response end-to-end · TTS producing Vietnamese · Gradio running

phases.name: Evaluation, Signature Demo & Report
phases.gate: Gate 3: 5 deliverables complete · ≥10 golden scenarios + ≥3 exception · latency report · failure analysis · pip install clean · no secret leak · demo video recorded

key_decisions: Architecture Doc is Gate 0 — no code before design is locked
Text-first development: dialogue core runs and tests in text mode before voice I/O is added
DialogueEngine.process(text) → (reply, SlotState) is the frozen cross-track contract set in Phase 0
models/schemas.py and all */base.py interfaces are frozen after Phase 0; signature changes require both tracks to sync and pull immediately
State machine (LangGraph) handles slot lifecycle — LLM does NOT hold conversation state
Piper local ONNX is primary TTS for reproducibility; edge-tts only for demo video swap
No RAG — static warranty policy (G_2/G_4) keeps complexity low and frees time for eval
LangGraph graph capped at ≤7 nodes; no subgraph per category
Evaluation investment: slot F1 + WER (jiwer) + routing confusion matrix + latency p50/p95 + ablation study + failure analysis
requirements.txt is append-only with == pinning; conflict resolution is union of both tracks
pipeline.py owned by Track B (Phuong) as integration seam; Track A reviews only
8 exception strategies: missing · correction · ambiguous · out-of-scope · garbled · emergency · stuck-2+ · hangup
notes: MANIFEST_TYPE=PRD used; document is a construction/execution plan with phased delivery gates and team coordination rules rather than a pure user-requirements document, but PRD classification is authoritative per manifest.
